title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Bajaj Electricals - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Bajaj Electricals - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Bajaj Electricals are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Bajaj Electricals:
Bajaj Electricals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Electricals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
